MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-07-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAM JALALIAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Reliance Construction's "motion to strike portions of plaintiff's first amended complaint" is denied. The at-issue contract provision is ambiguous and may well require extrinsic evidence to interpret. The issue is not appropriate for determination at the pleading stage.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
